features: STYLISH TRAY FOR FOOD PRESENTATION: Serve tea, snacks, or meals with elegance using this multi-purpose tray, designed to elevate kitchen storage, food service, and everyday table settings.

SUITABLE FOR HOME OR CATERING USE: Whether used as a tea tray, plastic tray, or snack server, this versatile serving solution fits seamlessly into both household and professional environments.
DECORATIVE GIFT FOR PRACTICAL LIVING: A thoughtful gift for new homeowners or anyone who loves stylish kitchen tray designs—perfect for birthdays, housewarmings, or seasonal gifting.
